description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named wiki that runs on push to master, feature branches, and specific paths, as well as on pull requests to master affecting those paths. The workflow should run with concurrency control, cancelling any in-progress runs for the same reference. In an ubuntu-latest job with read-only repository access, check out the code including submodules, and use the external-repo-sync-action to sync the ./docs directory to another repository using a GH_ACCESS_TOKEN from secrets.
